Na4!?== This strange looking move was first employed by [[w:Ashot Nadanian|Ashot Nadanian]] in 1996. Usually it is not recommended to put Knights on the edge of the board, but here it is meaningful. White takes the important c5-square under control and going to force black's Knight from the center with е4. Eventually, the a4-Knight can occupy the c5-square and attack the pawn on b7. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. '''1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 g6 3.Nc3 d5 4.cxd5 Nxd5'''
